title: Lesson Plan Builder
description: Draft a single-day lesson plan with objectives, activities, and a quick check for understanding.
template: Help me draft a lesson plan. Ask me for the grade level, subject, topic, and length of the class period if I haven't given them yet. Then produce: a learning objective, a short warm-up activity, the main instructional sequence with rough timing, a formative check for understanding, and a closing activity. Keep it practical for a single class period. Do not include any real student names or identifying details.
